name: Punch (Prodigy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and water in a large bowl.
2. Heat over medium until the sugar has completely dissolved (about 10 minutes).
3. Stir in the strong tea and fruit nectar until well combined.
4. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours, or until cold.
5. Just before serving, gently stir in the soda water.
6. Pour into glasses and serve over ice.
Makes 1/2 Gallon
Michael Roberts - Prodigy Guest Chefs Cookbook
